title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in sql, python, excel, tableau, bigquery. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: BrightLabs is hiring a middle data analyst to support analyzing business metrics, building dashboards, and explaining trends.
raw_text: Vacancy V039: Data Analyst at BrightLabs. Location: Odesa. Employment: contract. Required experience: 3.2 years. Required skills: sql, python, excel, tableau, bigquery, a/b testing. Optional skills: product analytics, ga4. Responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items.
